content.en:
"I have only condensed the second Eternal Realm Spirit not long ago, and the Eternal Dao Seed can continue to improve a little in a short period of time, and the strength will increase a little, and there should be hope to pass the sixth round of assessment of the Xuanxing Holy Gate Inheritance Land. "

After Ye Tian thought so, he continued to use the Chilin Ancient Spear and the Eternal Demon Pillar to improve his Eternal Dao Species.

With each passing moment, his strength is steadily improving.

Moreover, he is also studying the Tianyan Peng Light Technique and the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, the two perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques, so that the two Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques can be more perfectly coordinated, and if they are used well, they can burst out with more powerful combat power.

Gradually, hundreds of millions of solstice epochs passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed ascension speed had only slowed down, and he was much stronger than himself when he had just broken through.

And so this day.

Ye Tian came to the sixth round of assessment of the inheritance land of the Xuanxing Holy Gate again.

......

Rumble!!!!

In the place of assessment, a figure comparable to a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm appeared, besieging Ye Tian.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought hard with all his might, and all kinds of means were used, and he didn't dare to relax at all.

The last time he fought with these figures, he was completely suppressed, and finally he was bombarded, but he also killed one figure and severely injured several ways.

This time, he is stronger, and there is still hope to pass the sixth round of assessment.

Rumble!

Ye Tian fought hard, relying on the powerful Tianyan Realm Scale Technique to resist their attacks, and he would also use the Tianyan Peng Light Technique to dodge attacks and attack these figures.

It's just that, even so, it still can't occupy an absolute advantage.

The key is that his attack power can't severely damage a mid-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he needs to rely on a long time and burning the Eternal Dao Seed to have any hope of killing an Eternal Realm mid-level powerhouse.

In the midst of the collision and killing, Ye Tian finally killed one of the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-rank figures at the cost of being injured.

After that, he slashed the figures of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm again and again, and the hope of passing the sixth round became bigger and bigger.

Ultimately.

At the cost of being seriously injured and dying, Ye Tian blasted the last Eternal Realm God Realm middle-level figure to death, and passed the sixth round of assessment of the Xuanxing Holy Gate.

"I finally passed, if I pass the seventh round of assessment, then I can take charge of this Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins.!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he has only barely passed the sixth round of assessment, and he is still far from passing the seventh round of assessment.

Airplanes!

The figure of the white woman appeared, and she was rewarded for the sixth round of assessment.

This time, it's still an Eternal Spirit reward.

The Law of the Spiritual Inheritance of the Upper Grade Realm - The Law of the Xuanxing Ancient Phoenix

For such a reward, Ye Tian felt that it was normal, he had expected it a long time ago.

But in fact, he still expected other rewards, after all, he still had the Xuanxing Red Dragon, a high-grade realm spirit inheritance, but now this inheritance has also been perfected and deduced by him into a perfect-level eternal realm spirit inheritance, and it has been renamed Tianyan Red Dragon.

If he condenses the spirit of the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm, he will definitely have the hope of passing the seventh round of assessment, and then he will be able to master all the inheritances here.

Therefore, this Xuanxing Ancient Phoenix Inheritance has a mediocre effect for him.

After all, he could get it early in the evening.

......

"Those Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level powerhouses in the assessment are all condensed from the Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins, and they should all belong to the weak Eternal Realm Divine Realm middle-level powerhouses, so my current strength is not strong among the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and it is not even powerful among the four Eternal Realm Spirit powerhouses. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, his strength can be improved step by step.

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced hard, occasionally exploring some treasures or forbidden places in the Eternal Realm, hoping to obtain more resources similar to the Eternal Demon Pillar and accelerate the refining efficiency of his Eternal Dao Species.

this day.

His wife, Xiao Yue, took the lead in raising the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, after all, her foundation was insufficient, and the Eternal Dao Seed Limit was naturally limited, so she took the lead in raising it to the limit.

Next, she can go and condense the Eternal Realm Spirit.

Ye Tian came to Xiao Yue's side for the first time.

"Yue'er, this is a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, you can cultivate this!"

Ye Tianyi pointed at Xiao Yue's eyebrows and passed on the inheritance method of the snake realm spirit of the Tianyan Realm to Xiao Yue.

Soon, Xiao Yue completely accepted this inheritance.

Subsequently, Xiao Yue began to hit the bottleneck and condense the first Eternal Realm Spirit.

Xiao Yue herself is also a perfect-level Eternal Dao species, and she is cultivating a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and she is still condensing the first Eternal Realm Spirit, so the success rate will naturally be very high, almost one hundred percent.

It's just that if the impact is successful, it will also fall into a long period of weakness.

Ye Tian has prepared a lot of resources for Xiao Yue, but these resources are definitely not enough, but the weak period is not a problem for Xiao Yue, after all, with Ye Tian protecting Xiao Yue, Xiao Yue is unlikely to encounter danger.

Soon after.

Rumble!!!!

Xiao Yue successfully broke through and condensed the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Realm Spirit, and possessed the Heavenly Yan Scale Armor Technique, a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique, and her strength naturally skyrocketed many times.

After Xiao Yue's breakthrough, her daughter Ye Xingyue also reached her current limit, and Ye Tian also passed on to her daughter the method of spiritual inheritance in the Snake Realm of the Tianyan Realm.

Then, Ye Xingyue also completed a breakthrough and became a first-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

In the end, it was Ye Xingchen's turn, and he also easily broke through to the initial level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and condensed the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Realm Spirit.

In terms of strength, it is natural that Ye Xingchen is stronger, and Xiao Yue and Ye Xingyue are slightly weaker (is it good).

this day.

Ye Xingchen said goodbye to Ye Tian.

"Father, it's too boring here in the Endless Realm, I'm going to join the Realm and make my way around. "

Ye Xingchen said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded and agreed.

"Remember, don't go into some really dangerous places, even if you are a perfect eternal Dao seed and are not afraid of demon seeding, but there are some terrifying demon seeds hidden in some places, and those demon seeds have a high level of intelligence, maybe they are connected to the real demon seed abyss. "

Ye Tian told Ye Xingchen about the Demon Seed Abyss, so Ye Xingchen also knew the mystery of the Demon Seed Abyss.

"Father, I'm just wandering around, don't take any chances!"

Ye Xingchen assured.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen left the Endless Realm Alliance, first went to the Realm Court, registered as a member of the Realm Court, and then ventured into various territories of the Eternal Realm Kingdom.
